items.title: Load-time decisions in the ML pipeline
items.mermaid:
flowchart TD
  disk["Files on disk\nCSV / Parquet / JSON"] --> read["read_* with dtype, usecols, parse_dates"]
  read --> frame["DataFrame in memory"]
  frame --> mem["memory_usage audit"]
  frame --> splitPlan["Plan train / val / test boundaries"]
  splitPlan --> downstream["Cleaning, joins, modeling"]
items.caption: Loading chooses format, schema, and memory footprint before any transformation or modeling step.

items.title: Format trade-off at a glance
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  csv["CSV\nno schema, text parse"] --> pandas["pandas DataFrame"]
  parquet["Parquet\ntyped columns, compressed"] --> pandas
  jsonl["JSON Lines\nnested records"] --> normalize["json_normalize"] --> pandas
items.caption: Each format enters pandas differently; Parquet preserves types, CSV and JSON need more care at read time.
